rivalEvents.talentPoach.name: Talent Poaching Push
rivalEvents.talentPoach.description: NovaRun is approaching one of your key people with its fast-shipping reputation.
rivalEvents.talentPoach.counterOffer.des: Spend cash to protect trust and team cohesion.
rivalEvents.talentPoach.letGo.text: Let them go and save cash
rivalEvents.talentPoach.letGo.descriptio: You preserve runway, but your rival accelerates.
rivalEvents.modelRace.name: Model Performance Race
rivalEvents.modelRace.description: Jemiinni published a new multimodal benchmark and grabbed market attention.
rivalEvents.modelRace.researchSprint.des: Burn data and cash to recover technical credibility.
rivalEvents.modelRace.differentiate.desc: Win with trust and usability instead of benchmark numbers.
rivalEvents.enterpriseBid.name: Enterprise Bid Fight
rivalEvents.enterpriseBid.description: Automaru is targeting a large enterprise automation contract.
rivalEvents.enterpriseBid.premiumPilot.d: Absorb upfront cost to build enterprise trust.
rivalEvents.enterpriseBid.ignoreBid.text: Skip the bid and keep cash
rivalEvents.enterpriseBid.ignoreBid.desc: You stay comfortable now but lose enterprise initiative.
